headline: Central Banks Split 50/50 on Stablecoin Risks

article.title: US, UK central bankers offer contrary views on stablecoins
article.summary: Federal Reserve governor Christopher Waller told a conference on Sunday that stablecoins expand the reach of US policy while the Bank of England’s Megan Greene expects their popularity will soon fade.

headline: Saylor Hints $1B BTC Buy Amid Crypto Rally

article.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor teases BTC buy with 'working better' tweet
article.summary: Strategy could be set to announce it has resumed buying Bitcoin after pausing in recent weeks as the biggest crypto looks poised to close out the month down more than 3.5%.

headline: Ryan Buys Svalner Atlas for Undisclosed Sum

article.title: Ryan Is Said to Agree to Buy Nordic Tax Adviser Svalner Atlas
article.summary: Ryan LLC, backed by Neuberger and Onex Corp., has agreed to acquire European tax adviser Svalner Atlas Advisors, according to people familiar with the matter.

headline: Oil Surges 3% From 6-Week Lows Amid Iran Talks

article.title: Oil Rises From Six-Week Low Amid Uncertainty Over US-Iran Deal
article.summary: Oil rose from a six-week low amid uncertainty over the outlook for a peace deal to end the war in Iran.

headline: Trump Order Boosts $10B Stablecoin Market Overnight

article.title: How President Trump’s Immigration Order Will Feed the Stablecoin Economy, Bitcoin ATMs
article.summary: When the Trump family faced pressure from banks, it embraced crypto. Now, immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally face a similar choice.

headline: $800K Bitcoin Dump Funds Florida Congressional Run

article.title: Florida Candidate Liquidates $800K in Bitcoin to Bankroll Congressional Bid
article.summary: A Republican candidate jockeying to represent Florida’s 22nd Congressional District liquidated Bitcoin to help fuel his political bid.

headline: $2M unlocked in 2016 ICO contract after hack

article.title: Dev helps rescue $2 million locked in 2016 ICO contract for nine years with whitehat exploit
article.summary: The developer told The Block that two of 48 eligible investors have already claimed 96.5 ETH that was unfrozen, worth nearly $200,000 at current prices.

headline: Sui Halts 3 Times Due to Upgrade Bugs

article.title: Sui traces three mainnet halts to upgrade bugs, including a fix it knew carried halt risk
article.summary: The Sui Foundation said no user funds were at risk and credited AI agents with speeding up its diagnosis of the incidents.

headline: US Stocks Surge 3% Amid Bubble Concerns

article.title: Wall Street bulls bet US stocks rally will defy bubble fears
article.summary: Investors and strategists shrug off worries that markets could be overheating by betting on huge gains for AI-linked shares
